aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data and conversational content. The current site content is not optimized for AI queries or recommendations.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is operational but lacks photos and engagement features like posts and Q&A.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Oceanside, CA
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating in-depth content and obtaining relevant certifications

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The site lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, add FAQ content, and optimize for conversational queries to improve AI visibility and citation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expected 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are likely already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Oceanside
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to improve your visibility with AI assistants and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
